cli-reference-in-core-identity.description: Complete CLI command reference embedded in core-identity.md for all agents

corrected-agent-commands.description: All 26 agents rebuilt with correct CLI command references

four-option-discuss.description: discuss-set presents exactly 4 gray area options matching AskUserQuestion limit

build-agents-propagation.description: Running build-agents produces agents that include CLI command reference from core-identity.md
